sections.heading: Clinical Note
sections.section_value:
Chief Complaint
Left hand pain
History of Present Illness
The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient also reports issues with their joints and a lingering issue with their knee surgery. The patient reports insomnia and a stressful summer. The patient is currently taking fosamax.
Findings
Examination reveals pain in the left hand.
Assessment
The patient has pain in the left hand.
Plan
The doctor will order a refill on fosamax. The doctor will continue the patient on fosamax.
